title: When Sky Falls Upward
synopsis: Nimbus the cloud being and her animal friends discover that rain is falling upward from their scratched yellow submarine, leading them on a gentle adventure to understand impossible weather through friendship and wonder.

pages.text: The raindrop fell up past the porthole, then another, then six more. Nimbus pressed her fluffy face against the scratched yellow glass of their submarine and watched the water climb toward the clouds instead of away from them. 'Well,' she said to herself, 'that's definitely backward.' The submarine creaked gently as it bobbed in the strange weather, its fogged portholes making everything look like a dream.

illustration.description: Inside the scratched yellow submarine with fogged portholes, Nimbus - a fluffy cloud being with soft white cotton-like body, tiny blue-sky eyes, and a rainbow ribbon trailing behind - peers out a porthole as raindrops fall upward past the window. The submarine interior is cozy but weathered. Bright sunny playground art style with primary colors, white space, joyful energetic atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Nimbus looking out a submarine porthole at upward-falling rain

pages.text: Rabbit thumped over from the navigation corner, her whiskers twitching with curiosity. 'The rain's doing somersaults,' she announced, as if rain always had gymnastic tendencies. Fox lifted his red head from the periscope and nodded seriously. 'It started three minutes ago,' he reported. 'Right after that thunder that sounded like giggling.'

illustration.description: Inside the submarine, Rabbit and Fox join Nimbus - a fluffy cloud being with soft white cotton-like body, tiny blue-sky eyes, and a rainbow ribbon trailing behind. Rabbit has brown fur and alert ears, Fox has red fur and a bushy tail. The submarine has brass instruments and gauges. Bright sunny playground art style with primary colors, white space, joyful energetic atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Rabbit and Fox talking with Nimbus inside the submarine

pages.text: Earlier that morning, Nimbus had been drifting through the submarine's main cabin, her rainbow ribbon trailing lazily behind her cotton-like body. The weather outside had been perfectly ordinary - which is to say, slightly magical but predictable. Clouds stayed up, rain fell down, and the submarine's scratched yellow hull gleamed in the sunlight filtering through the water above them.

illustration.description: Nimbus - a fluffy cloud being with soft white cotton-like body, tiny blue-sky eyes, and a rainbow ribbon trailing behind - drifts through the submarine's main cabin in normal morning light streaming through fogged portholes. The submarine appears cozy and lived-in. Bright sunny playground art style with primary colors, white space, joyful energetic atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Nimbus floating peacefully through the submarine cabin in morning light

pages.text: That's when Turtle had called from the observation deck: 'Something's tickling the sky!' Her voice carried the sort of concern that meant interesting things were about to happen. Nimbus had floated up through the hatch to find Turtle pointing at a patch of air where the clouds were shimmering like water, and the water was hanging like clouds.

illustration.description: On the submarine's observation deck, Turtle with a green shell points at a shimmering sky while Nimbus - a fluffy cloud being with soft white cotton-like body, tiny blue-sky eyes, and a rainbow ribbon trailing behind - emerges from a hatch. The sky above shows patches where clouds and water seem to switch places. Bright sunny playground art style with primary colors, white space, joyful energetic atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Turtle pointing at strange shimmering sky with Nimbus on submarine deck

pages.text: Now, back in the present moment, Squirrel scampered down from the periscope with her cheeks full of acorns and explanations. 'I saw who did it,' she chattered, spitting out three acorns that rolled across the submarine floor. 'There's a whale up there, swimming through the air like it's perfectly normal ocean.'

illustration.description: Inside the submarine, Squirrel with gray fur and a bushy tail chatters excitedly while acorns roll on the floor. Nimbus - a fluffy cloud being with soft white cotton-like body, tiny blue-sky eyes, and a rainbow ribbon trailing behind - and the other animals listen. The submarine's fogged portholes glow with strange light. Bright sunny playground art style with primary colors, white space, joyful energetic atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Squirrel explaining about the whale while acorns roll across submarine floor

pages.text: Nimbus felt her cotton-like form grow slightly more solid with excitement. Air-swimming whales were exactly the sort of thing that made perfect sense in their world. 'What kind of whale?' she asked, though she suspected she already knew. Fox's ears perked up. 'The kind that rearranges weather when it's happy,' he said matter-of-factly.

illustration.description: The animal friends gather around Nimbus - a fluffy cloud being with soft white cotton-like body, tiny blue-sky eyes, and a rainbow ribbon trailing behind - in animated discussion inside the scratched yellow submarine. Through the fogged portholes, hints of a large shadow can be seen moving past. Bright sunny playground art style with primary colors, white space, joyful energetic atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Friends discussing the whale while a shadow passes by the portholes

pages.text: They all crowded onto the observation deck, and sure enough, a magnificent blue whale was gliding through the air above them, her massive tail creating currents that pulled rain upward and pushed clouds downward. She moved with the same gentle grace whales used in water, except the water was sky and the sky was having wonderful ideas about gravity.

illustration.description: On the submarine's deck, all the friends including Nimbus - a fluffy cloud being with soft white cotton-like body, tiny blue-sky eyes, and a rainbow ribbon trailing behind - look up at a majestic blue whale swimming through the air above them. Rain falls upward around the whale's tail in graceful arcs. Bright sunny playground art style with primary colors, white space, joyful energetic atmosphere.
illustration.alt: All friends on deck watching a blue whale swimming through the air above

pages.text: The whale noticed them watching and sang a greeting that made the upward rain dance in spirals. Nimbus sang back - a soft, cloudy melody that tasted like morning mist. 'She's celebrating,' Nimbus translated as the whale's song washed over them. 'It's her first time flying, and she wanted to share the joy by giving the rain wings too.'

illustration.description: Nimbus - a fluffy cloud being with soft white cotton-like body, tiny blue-sky eyes, and a rainbow ribbon trailing behind - sings up toward the whale while musical notes seem to float in the air. The whale above responds with visible sound waves, and spiral patterns form in the upward-falling rain. Bright sunny playground art style with primary colors, white space, joyful energetic atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Nimbus singing to the whale with musical notes and spiral rain patterns

pages.text: What followed was the most delightful afternoon any of them could remember. The whale taught them games that worked only with backward rain - catching droplets that fell up required entirely different reflexes. Rabbit discovered she could hop higher by pushing off the rising water, while Fox learned to use his tail as a sail in the upward wind.

illustration.description: All the animal friends play in the impossible weather around their submarine. Rabbit hops high using upward-falling rain, Fox spreads his tail like a sail, and Nimbus - a fluffy cloud being with soft white cotton-like body, tiny blue-sky eyes, and a rainbow ribbon trailing behind - dances among the rising raindrops. The whale swims overhead watching fondly. Bright sunny playground art style with primary colors, white space, joyful energetic atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Friends playing games in upward-falling rain with whale swimming overhead

pages.text: As the sun began to set (sideways, which was apparently another gift from their flying whale friend), Nimbus realized something important. The impossible weather hadn't needed explaining - it had needed experiencing. Sometimes the most wonderful things happened when the world decided to rearrange itself just to see what friendship looked like from a different angle.

illustration.description: A golden sunset casting sideways light across the scene as all the friends, including Nimbus - a fluffy cloud being with soft white cotton-like body, tiny blue-sky eyes, and a rainbow ribbon trailing behind - gather peacefully on the submarine deck. The whale in the sky glows in the unusual sunset light, and the upward rain catches the golden rays. Bright sunny playground art style with primary colors, white space, joyful energetic atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Friends gathered on deck in magical sideways sunset light with whale above

coverPrompt.description: A scratched yellow submarine floating in a sky where raindrops fall upward, with Nimbus - a fluffy cloud being with soft white cotton-like body, tiny blue-sky eyes, and a rainbow ribbon trailing behind - drifting nearby alongside various woodland animals looking up in wonder. Bright sunny playground art style with primary colors, white space, joyful energetic atmosphere.
coverPrompt.alt: Cover showing upward-falling rain around a yellow submarine with Nimbus and animal friends

questions.question: What was impossible about the weather in the story?
questions.explanation: The rain was falling upward instead of downward, which is what made it impossible weather!

questions.question: Who was causing the backward rain?
questions.explanation: A blue whale was swimming through the air and her movements were making the rain fall upward.

questions.question: Where did the friends live?
questions.explanation: Nimbus and her animal friends lived in a scratched yellow submarine with fogged portholes.

questions.question: Why was the whale making the weather backward?
choices: She was celebrating her first flight
questions.explanation: The whale was celebrating flying for the first time and wanted to share her joy by giving the rain wings too!

questions.question: How did the friends feel about the impossible weather?
questions.explanation: The friends had a delightful afternoon playing games in the backward rain and learning from the whale.
